metadata.title: UCF Framework Mappings
metadata.description: Maps controls from each supported framework to UCF domain IDs. Crosswalks between any two frameworks are derived by mapping through UCF IDs, eliminating the N-squared pairwise mapping problem.

guidance.nist_800_53: Account Management — create, enable, modify, disable, and remove accounts per organizational policy.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Controls — restrict logical access to information assets through authentication and authorization.
guidance.iso27001: Access control — policy and rules controlling access to information and processing facilities.
guidance.hipaa: Access Control — implement technical policies to limit access to ePHI to authorized persons.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Authorized Access Control — limit system access to authorized users, processes, and devices.

guidance.nist_800_53: Event Logging — determine events the system must be capable of logging.
guidance.soc2: Monitoring Infrastructure — detect anomalies that indicate unauthorized or malicious acts.
guidance.iso27001: Logging — produce, store, protect and analyse logs recording activities and events.
guidance.hipaa: Audit Controls — implement mechanisms to record and examine activity in ePHI systems.
guidance.cmmc_l2: System Auditing — create and retain system audit logs to enable monitoring.

guidance.nist_800_53: Baseline Configuration — develop, document, and maintain current baseline configurations.
guidance.soc2: Change Management — authorize, design, develop, test, and implement changes to meet objectives.
guidance.iso27001: Configuration management — establish and maintain configurations of systems, software and networks.
guidance.hipaa: Device and Media Controls — govern receipt and removal of hardware and electronic media.
guidance.cmmc_l2: System Baselines — establish and enforce security configuration settings for IT products.

guidance.nist_800_53: Identification and Authentication — uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Controls — authenticate users before granting access to systems and data.
guidance.iso27001: Secure authentication — ensure secure log-on procedures and strong authentication mechanisms.
guidance.hipaa: Person or Entity Authentication — verify the identity of persons seeking access to ePHI.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Identification — identify and authenticate users of organizational systems.

guidance.nist_800_53: Incident Handling — implement handling capability for incidents including preparation, detection, and recovery.
guidance.soc2: Evaluates Security Events — evaluate security events to determine if they are incidents.
guidance.iso27001: Information security incident management — plan and prepare for managing information security incidents.
guidance.hipaa: Security Incident Procedures — identify and respond to suspected or known security incidents.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Incident Handling — establish operational incident-handling capability for organizational systems.

guidance.nist_800_53: Boundary Protection — monitor and control communications at external and key internal boundaries.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Security Measures — protect against threats from external sources.
guidance.iso27001: Networks security — manage and control networks to protect systems and applications.
guidance.hipaa: Transmission Security — implement technical measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI during transmission.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Boundary Protection — monitor, control, and protect organizational communications at boundaries.

guidance.nist_800_53: Flaw Remediation — identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner.
guidance.soc2: Threat and Vulnerability ID — use defined procedures to identify and assess threats and vulnerabilities.
guidance.iso27001: Management of technical vulnerabilities — obtain information about vulnerabilities and take appropriate action.
guidance.hipaa: Protection from Malicious Software — implement procedures for guarding against and detecting malicious software.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Flaw Remediation — identify, report, and correct information system flaws in a timely manner.

guidance.nist_800_53: Risk Assessment — assess risk to organizational operations, assets, and individuals.
guidance.soc2: Identifies and Analyzes Risk — identify and assess risks to the achievement of objectives.
guidance.iso27001: Classification of information — classify information according to security needs.
guidance.hipaa: Risk Management — implement measures to reduce risks and vulnerabilities to a reasonable level.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Risk Assessment — periodically assess risk to organizational systems and data.

guidance.nist_800_53: Personnel Screening — screen individuals prior to authorizing access to systems.
guidance.soc2: Demonstrates Commitment to Competence — evaluate competence of workforce.
guidance.iso27001: Screening — verify backgrounds of candidates prior to joining.
guidance.hipaa: Authorization/Supervision — implement procedures for workforce access authorization.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Personnel Screening — screen individuals prior to authorizing access to CUI systems.

guidance.nist_800_53: Physical Access Authorizations — develop and maintain lists of authorized physical access.
guidance.soc2: Restricts Physical Access — restrict physical access to facilities and protected information assets.
guidance.iso27001: Physical security perimeters — define and use security perimeters to protect sensitive areas.
guidance.hipaa: Facility Access Controls — implement policies to limit physical access to ePHI systems.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Limit Physical Access — limit physical access to organizational systems and environments.

guidance.nist_800_53: Literacy Training and Awareness — provide security literacy training.
guidance.soc2: Demonstrates Commitment to Competence — train personnel on security policies.
guidance.iso27001: Information security awareness — provide appropriate awareness and training programs.
guidance.hipaa: Security Awareness and Training — implement training for all workforce members.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Role-Based Awareness — ensure personnel are aware of security risks and applicable policies.

guidance.nist_800_53: Contingency Plan — develop a contingency plan addressing recovery and reconstitution.
guidance.soc2: Environmental Threat Management — design systems for resilience.
guidance.iso27001: Information security during disruption — maintain security during adverse situations.
guidance.hipaa: Contingency Plan — establish policies for responding to emergencies or system failures.
guidance.cmmc_l2: System Recovery — establish plans for system recovery and reconstitution.

guidance.nist_800_53: Cryptographic Key Establishment — establish and manage cryptographic keys.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Controls — implement encryption and key management.
guidance.iso27001: Use of cryptography — define rules for effective cryptography and key management.
guidance.hipaa: Encryption — implement mechanisms to encrypt and decrypt ePHI.
guidance.cmmc_l2: CUI Encryption — employ FIPS-validated cryptography to protect CUI.

guidance.nist_800_53: Authority to Process PII — determine and document legal authority for processing PII.
guidance.soc2: Privacy Policy Notification — provide notice about privacy policies to data subjects.
guidance.iso27001: Privacy and protection of PII — ensure privacy and protection of PII.
guidance.hipaa: Safeguards — implement appropriate safeguards to protect privacy of PHI.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Media Protection — protect and control media containing CUI.
guidance.gdpr: GDPR Principles — ensure lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimization.

guidance.nist_800_53: Vulnerability Monitoring — monitor and scan for vulnerabilities.
guidance.soc2: Threat and Vulnerability ID — identify and assess threats and vulnerabilities.
guidance.iso27001: Technical vulnerability management — take remediation steps for identified vulnerabilities.
guidance.hipaa: Security Management — prevent, detect, contain, and correct security violations.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Vulnerability Scanning — scan for vulnerabilities periodically and on new threats.

guidance.nist_800_53: Configuration Change Control — manage changes through formal request, review, and approval.
guidance.soc2: Change Management — authorize, design, test, and implement changes.
guidance.iso27001: Change management — control changes to information processing facilities.
guidance.hipaa: Integrity Controls — protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Change Tracking — track, review, approve/disapprove, and log changes.

guidance.nist_800_53: System Monitoring — detect attacks, unauthorized connections, and anomalies.
guidance.soc2: Monitoring Infrastructure — detect anomalies indicating security threats.
guidance.iso27001: Monitoring activities — monitor for anomalous behaviour.
guidance.hipaa: Audit Controls — record and examine activity in systems containing ePHI.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Event Review — review and update logged events on a defined frequency.

guidance.nist_800_53: Supply Chain Risk Management Plan — manage supply chain risks.
guidance.soc2: Monitors Third-party Vendors — assess third-party vendor risks.
guidance.iso27001: ICT supply chain security — manage ICT supply chain security risks.
guidance.hipaa: Business Associate Contracts — ensure BAAs include security requirements.
guidance.gdpr: Processor Contracts — ensure data processing agreements with all processors.

guidance.nist_800_53: Media Access — restrict access to media to authorized individuals.
guidance.soc2: Secure Disposal — dispose of confidential information securely.
guidance.iso27001: Storage media — manage media through their lifecycle.
guidance.hipaa: Disposal — implement policies for final disposal of ePHI media.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Media Protection — protect and control system media containing CUI.

guidance.nist_800_53: Controlled Maintenance — perform maintenance using organization-approved tools.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Controls — control system access during maintenance.
guidance.iso27001: Equipment maintenance — maintain equipment for availability and integrity.
guidance.hipaa: Maintenance Records — document maintenance for facility security hardware.
guidance.cmmc_l2: System Maintenance — perform maintenance on organizational systems.

guidance.nist_800_53: Boundary Protection — implement subnetworks and enforce network segmentation.
guidance.soc2: Logical Access Security — implement network controls against external threats.
guidance.iso27001: Network segregation — segregate groups of information services within networks.
guidance.hipaa: Transmission Security — guard against unauthorized access over networks.
guidance.cmmc_l2: System Connections — monitor and control connections at external system boundaries.

guidance.nist_800_53: Developer Testing — require developers to perform security testing and evaluation.
guidance.soc2: Change Management — test and verify changes in non-production before deployment.
guidance.iso27001: Secure development — apply rules for secure development of software and systems.
guidance.cmmc_l2: Flaw Remediation — identify and correct system flaws within SDLC processes.
guidance.gdpr: Data Protection by Design — implement appropriate measures for data protection principles.
guidance.iso_42001: AI System Lifecycle — plan, implement, and control AI system lifecycle processes.
